name: Amruutha Rao
title: Senior AI Tech Product Manager & Data Scientist
base_skills: Product Management Tools: Jira, Confluence, Trello, Monday.com, Asana, Azure DevOps
Data Science Tools: Python, R, SQL, Apache Spark, Hadoop, NoSQL Databases, Google BigQuery, AWS Redshift, Jupyter, MATLAB
Cloud Platforms: Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), IBM Watson
Machine Learning: Supervised & Unsupervised Learning, Deep Learning (TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision, Time Series Forecasting, Recommender Systems
Data Science & Analytics: Data Preprocessing, Feature Engineering, Model Evaluation, A/B Testing, Statistical Analysis, Data Visualization (Matplotlib, Seaborn, Tableau, Power BI)
Automation & Integration Tools: Zapier, Make.com, n8n, MuleSoft
Model Deployment & Monitoring: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD Pipelines
Collaboration & Communication: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Google Meet, Figma, Miro
Agile & Scrum Methodologies: Sprint Planning, Product Backlog Management, Cross-functional Team Leadership, Stakeholder Engagement, Risk Management, Issue Resolution
AI Ethics & Governance: Bias Mitigation, Fairness in AI, AI Transparency, Data Privacy Compliance (GDPR, CCPA)
Software Development: API Design, RESTful Services, Microservices, Data Warehousing, ETL Pipelines
Leadership & Management: Cross-functional Team Leadership, Strategic Planning, Stakeholder Management, Team Coaching, Mentorship, Budget Management

experience.title: Senior Product Manager Technical
base_bullets: Led a cross-functional team in developing innovative AI-driven features for Hubble, an intelligent dashcam, resulting in improved real-time detection of unsafe driving behaviors, such as close following, drowsiness, and red-light violations. This contributed to significant reductions in road accidents by enhancing driver safety.

Spearheaded the development of the DMEWS Acute Diarrhea Outbreak Prediction model, leveraging demographic, socio-economic, and climatic data to predict outbreaks, which resulted in more targeted health interventions and more efficient public health management in Texas.

Conducted market research and competitive analysis, gathering customer feedback and implementing automated test systems to evaluate feature accuracy, ultimately leading to a more customer-centric product with higher user adoption and satisfaction.

Defined, built, and maintained detailed product roadmaps and technical documentation, ensuring all stakeholders, including business, engineering, and operations teams, were aligned on goals, timelines, and expectations, resulting in improved cross-functional collaboration.
Managed technical dependencies between embedded systems, backend infrastructure, and annotation teams, facilitating seamless integration, version control, and meeting delivery milestones.
Played a pivotal role in the deployment of machine learning models across the product lifecycle, optimizing features, which led to a more responsive AI solution that improved user experience.
Led Agile methodologies, conducting sprint planning, retrospectives, and daily stand-ups to ensure timely and high-quality feature delivery, improving overall project efficiency by 20%.

Established and maintained strong relationships with cross-functional teams, conducting regular workshops and team-building activities that fostered innovation, improved problem-solving, and optimized collaboration and productivity.

Mentored and guided junior team members, fostering a culture of knowledge-sharing and hands-on learning within the AI and product management teams, resulting in increased team efficiency and innovation.
Introduced advanced data visualization tools and feature-tracking processes, providing stakeholders with clear, actionable insights and enabling faster decision-making and issue resolution.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager (GenAI)
base_bullets: Managed a portfolio of AI-driven product initiatives, ensuring strategic planning and execution that significantly improved operational efficiency and delivered results faster across high-priority projects.

Led the integration of HelloDrew, an AI-powered voice agent for 10,000+ real-estate platforms, enhancing lead engagement, improving CRM syncing, and reducing manual effort, which resulted in a 25% increase in lead conversion rates.

Designed and implemented a comprehensive automated lead management system, integrating Jotform, Make.com, and ActiveCampaign, which improved lead qualification and follow-up efficiency, resulting in a 30% reduction in lead processing time.

Championed the development of secure, enterprise-grade AI solutions, ensuring full compliance with GDPR and CCPA, and enabling large-scale, secure AI product rollouts that aligned with business and regulatory needs.

Played a central role in the development of AI product roadmaps, collaborating with design, engineering, and operations teams to ensure successful product launches that met customer needs and aligned with business goals.
Oversaw the deployment of large-scale machine learning models, optimizing performance through cloud infrastructure, and ensuring scalability and operational excellence.
Collaborated closely with customers to capture product feedback, translating it into actionable insights that led to feature improvements and a measurable increase in user satisfaction.
Led sprint cycles and facilitated stand-ups and retrospectives, ensuring alignment across teams and timely delivery of project milestones.

experience.title: Data Scientist
base_bullets: Led AI-driven data science projects aimed at optimizing healthcare operations across 55 communities, utilizing advanced machine learning models to improve patient outcomes and streamline operational workflows.

Developed and deployed machine learning models that significantly enhanced business KPIs by automating data ingestion, preprocessing, and transformation processes, improving reliability and efficiency in product deployments.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate AI-driven features into core product offerings, ensuring that they met both technical feasibility and regulatory standards.

Implemented predictive maintenance solutions for healthcare infrastructure, utilizing LSTM and XGBoost models to reduce system downtime by 15%, minimize risk, and enhance long-term infrastructure reliability.
Designed advanced statistical models to forecast potential KPI degradation, enabling proactive system alerts that reduced operational risks and enhanced resource management.
Leveraged big data tools on Azure to manage, model, and visualize healthcare data, providing stakeholders with real-time insights that guided decision-making and operational planning.
Oversaw the deployment and optimization of AI models, continuously iterating on solutions based on stakeholder feedback to drive product improvement and increase overall effectiveness.
Conducted comprehensive A/B testing and hypothesis validation for software updates, ensuring that product enhancements were aligned with market needs and user expectations.

experience.title: Product Manager & Data Integration Developer
base_bullets: Developed and optimized complex ETL pipelines, integrating large datasets from multiple sources and ensuring that data transformation and validation processes met business and operational needs.

Managed the design and architecture of a data warehouse project that supported a new ticketing application, aligning the system architecture with business requirements and driving improved data management practices.
Enhanced and restructured OLAP cubes for BI reporting, streamlining data from disparate systems to provide deeper insights, enabling better decision-making across departments.
Led the end-to-end management of a major grant-funded project, overseeing budgets, timelines, recruitment, and stakeholder communications to ensure that the project met all KPIs and goals.
Designed and developed automated reporting and dashboard solutions, improving internal communication and ensuring key performance data was accessible to decision-makers across the organization.

education.school: The University of Texas at Dallas
